t.t-esc: record.cheque_physical_display_ref.value or record.settlement_document_ref.value or record.source_document_ref.value or 'Cheque'

button.name: action_route_post_cheque_accounting
button.invisible: not route_cheque_can_accountant_work or cheque_followup_state not in [False, 'received', 'deposited'] or route_cheque_accounting_enabled == False or route_cheque_accounting_state != 'not_posted'

button.name: action_cheque_mark_deposited
button.invisible: not route_cheque_can_accountant_work or cheque_followup_state not in [False, 'received'] or route_cheque_accounting_state == 'not_posted'

button.name: action_route_post_cheque_accounting
button.invisible: not route_cheque_can_accountant_work or cheque_followup_state != 'cleared' or route_cheque_accounting_enabled == False or route_cheque_accounting_state != 'not_posted'

button.name: action_route_post_cheque_accounting
button.invisible: not route_cheque_can_accountant_work or cheque_followup_state not in ['bounced', 'cancelled'] or route_cheque_accounting_enabled == False or route_cheque_accounting_state != 'not_posted'

button.name: action_cheque_reset_received
button.invisible: not route_cheque_can_accountant_work or cheque_followup_state in [False, 'received'] or route_cheque_accounting_move_count != 0

button.name: action_route_post_cheque_accounting
button.invisible: not route_cheque_can_accountant_work or cheque_followup_state not in [False, 'received', 'deposited'] or route_cheque_accounting_enabled == False or route_cheque_accounting_state != 'not_posted'

button.name: action_cheque_mark_deposited
button.invisible: not route_cheque_can_accountant_work or cheque_followup_state not in [False, 'received'] or route_cheque_accounting_state == 'not_posted'

button.name: action_route_post_cheque_accounting
button.invisible: not route_cheque_can_accountant_work or cheque_followup_state != 'cleared' or route_cheque_accounting_enabled == False or route_cheque_accounting_state != 'not_posted'

button.name: action_route_post_cheque_accounting
button.invisible: not route_cheque_can_accountant_work or cheque_followup_state not in ['bounced', 'cancelled'] or route_cheque_accounting_enabled == False or route_cheque_accounting_state != 'not_posted'

button.name: action_route_post_cheque_accounting
button.invisible: not route_cheque_can_accountant_work or cheque_followup_state not in [False, 'received', 'deposited'] or route_cheque_accounting_enabled == False or route_cheque_accounting_state != 'not_posted'

button.name: action_cheque_mark_deposited
button.invisible: not route_cheque_can_accountant_work or cheque_followup_state not in [False, 'received'] or route_cheque_accounting_state == 'not_posted'

button.name: action_route_post_cheque_accounting
button.invisible: not route_cheque_can_accountant_work or cheque_followup_state != 'cleared' or route_cheque_accounting_enabled == False or route_cheque_accounting_state != 'not_posted'

button.name: action_route_post_cheque_accounting
button.invisible: not route_cheque_can_accountant_work or cheque_followup_state not in ['bounced', 'cancelled'] or route_cheque_accounting_enabled == False or route_cheque_accounting_state != 'not_posted'

button.name: action_cheque_reset_received
button.invisible: not route_cheque_can_accountant_work or cheque_followup_state in [False, 'received'] or route_cheque_accounting_move_count != 0

sheet.div: Cheque needs follow-up. This cheque no longer covers the collection amount, so its amount is treated as open due for the outlet until another collection is made.

t.t-esc: record.cheque_physical_display_ref.value or record.settlement_document_ref.value or record.source_document_ref.value or 'Cheque'

button.name: action_electronic_mark_verified
button.invisible: payment_mode not in ['bank', 'pos'] or not route_electronic_can_accountant_verify

button.name: action_electronic_mark_rejected
button.invisible: payment_mode not in ['bank', 'pos'] or not route_electronic_can_accountant_reject

button.name: action_route_post_electronic_receipt_accounting
button.invisible: payment_mode not in ['bank', 'pos'] or not route_electronic_can_post_receipt
